film.title: The War Room
film.overview: A behind-the-scenes documentary about the Clinton for President campaign, focusing on the adventures of spin doctors James Carville and George Stephanopoulos.

dialogues.dialogue: ♪ Are you registered, baby ♪♪  He is funneling money to his wife's law firm for state business. That's number one.
